ops.body: 2026-07-19 weekly-lane read (N1 of the figure-out-whats-next plan): digest CHANGED (nightly accrual; gate dataset digest 099ab548 → 7266903f), so the f7c1abdd "digest-unchanged skip" leg did not occur — and cannot occur naturally while the nightly accrues. What the lane did instead: GATE lane ran the full eval-what-you-serve path and correctly REJECTED the challenger (pr_auc 0.9025 but recall@2/100 0.0242 < incumbent 0.0252; journal verdict line present; incumbent v002-20260716-b76e7342c983 stays). WATCHER lane crashed pre-spend: OverlongEvalRows(2, 4096) at athome eval-row validation — before Reservation/any billable call, Tinker spend $0 (verified against installed tinker.py: the raise precedes the reservation). Daemon unaffected: still serves watcher v002-20260718 + gate v002-20260716 (pid 97342). Bug filed as cc-notes b998264e (fix + release before Sunday 07-26); f7c1abdd stays pending until a weekly pass completes both lanes cleanly (skip or legitimate verdict on each).
